task_completion.description: A Firefox bookmark folder named 'HVAC Regulatory Research' is created and contains at least four relevant bookmarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser showing the Bookmarks sidebar, toolbar menu, or Library window with a folder exactly named 'HVAC Regulatory Research' containing at least 4 saved web pages.

task_completion.description: A JSON file named 'refrigerant_compliance_guide.json' is created in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or text editor showing the file saved at the path '~/Documents/refrigerant_compliance_guide.json'.

task_completion.description: The JSON file contains the correct AIM Act signed year and phasedown percentages.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON content shows 'signed_into_law' as '2020' (or 2020), 'phasedown_2024_pct' as 40, 'phasedown_2029_pct' as 70, and 'phasedown_2036_pct' as 85 under the 'aim_act' key.

task_completion.description: The JSON file contains data for R-410A and at least three alternative refrigerants with their correct GWP and ASHRAE safety classifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON content under 'refrigerants' shows 'R-410A' (GWP ~2088, class A1) and at least three valid alternatives (e.g., R-32, R-454B, R-290, R-1234yf) with their correct GWP and safety class as specified in the privileged info.

task_completion.description: The JSON file correctly identifies that Section 608 certification, venting prohibition, and recordkeeping apply.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON content shows 'certification_required': true, 'venting_prohibited': true, and 'recordkeeping_required': true under the 'section_608' key.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to research the EPA regulations and refrigerants.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing Firefox open to EPA.gov or industry websites related to refrigerants and the AIM Act.

integrity.description: The bookmarks were created using the browser's actual bookmarking functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Firefox UI (Library, sidebar, or bookmark menu) is visible showing the created folder and bookmarks, rather than just a text file listing URLs.

integrity.description: The output file is formatted as valid JSON.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the file uses proper JSON syntax (curly braces, quotes around keys, colons, commas) matching the requested structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: AIM Act signed into law: 2020. Phasedown percentages: 2024 is 40, 2029 is 70, 2036 is 85. R-410A: GWP 1900-2200 (typically 2088), Class A1. Valid alternatives include: R-32 (GWP 600-750, Class A2L), R-454B (GWP 400-500, Class A2L), R-290/propane (GWP 0-10, Class A3), R-1234yf (GWP 0-5, Class A2L). Section 608 requirements: certification_required is true, venting_prohibited is true, recordkeeping_required is true.
